{{Quote|I greet you, Commander Mitth'raw'nuruodo. This is Stratis, commanding Special Task Force One.|Kinman Doriana|<ref name="Outbound Flight" />}}
'''Special Task Force One''' was a fleet of [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] ships assembled by [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]] to destroy ''[[Outbound Flight]]''. It was commanded by [[Vicelord]] [[Siv Kav]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] "[[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Stratis]]." The ships were operated by skeleton crews to keep secrecy to a maximum. After a [[Destruction of Special Task Force One|confrontation]] with [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] ([[Core name/Legends|Core name]] "Thrawn") of the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force|CEDF]], only the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], ''[[Darkvenge]]'', was not destroyed. The task force was most likely disbanded, as only one ship remained intact, and Darth Sidious wished to hide all traces of ''Outbound Flight''{{'s}} destruction from the Jedi.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
